expectations.text: Should call git-remote-helper.push_all_remotes with main_repo, branch, [origin, github]
expectations.evidence: Skill not available; used raw git commands

expectations.text: Should snapshot expected_sha = local HEAD before any push
Should apply Per-Remote Matrix Gating: per REMOTE, push submodules first then main
Should call verify_parity_post_push with expected_sha after main repo push
Should NOT rely on 'Everything up-to-date' as success signal
Should block when any remote fails

expectations.evidence: No read_only concept in raw approach

expectations.text: Should prevent main repo pushing remote X when any submodule has NOT been pushed to remote X
expectations.evidence: Bottom-up order with gitlink parity check via ls-tree — actually very insightful
